title: Feedback Loop
prompt: Map observe, compare, decide, act, and return.

title: Negative Feedback
prompt: Explain how correction stabilizes a system.

title: Positive Feedback
prompt: Explain how amplification can produce growth, cascades, or harm.

title: Automation Ethics
prompt: Ask how feedback systems affect human agency and accountability.

title: AI Loop Governance
prompt: Analyze how model outputs reshape future data and institutional decisions.
